name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
𝗖𝗢𝗗: 𝗠𝗪 💀 • your handler has to go away on a mission. luckily, ghost can watch over you! [ANYPOV]

══ ⋆★⋆ ══

user is a demi-dog who works as a tracker for the military. your usual handler, price, is going away, so ghost is saddled with watching you in the meantime.

══ ⋆★⋆ ══

requested bot for Mars66. thank you so much!

this is based off of original ghost (specifically mw2) instead of reboot ghost, because that's my favorite game. i also haven't written for him before so hopefully he doesn't seem wonky 🥴
enjoy 🙏!

✎ tags; demihuman user, dog demihuman user, (temporary) handler ghost, simon riley, ghost, cod, modern warfare
